anomalies.trigger_quote: Put the phone away or I will break it. Just write 45.
anomalies.ai_reasoning: Claude detected hostile language and direct threats towards a commission member attempting to log a dispute regarding ballot validity.

anomalies.trigger_quote: No, wait. Don't seal them yet. We have to wait for Ivan to call and confirm the numbers match.
anomalies.ai_reasoning: Transcription indicates a prolonged pause in counting while members wait for a 'phone call from the boss' before sealing the bags.

transcripts.content_json: [01:45:10] Speaker A: I need to write this in the protocol, these 5 are invalid.\n[01:45:18] Speaker B: You are not writing anything. Put the pen down.\n[01:45:22] Speaker B: Put the phone away or I will break it. Just write 45.
